abort.already_configured: This Coinbase account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The replacement credentials belong to a different Coinbase account.

error.invalid_key_format: This does not look like a Coinbase Advanced/CDP API key name. Use the full key name in the format organizations/ORG_ID/apiKeys/KEY_ID.

data_description.api_key: Paste the full CDP key name, for example organizations/ORG_ID/apiKeys/KEY_ID. Do not use the display name.
data_description.api_token: Paste the EC private key from the downloaded Coinbase CDP key JSON. Literal \n line breaks are accepted.

user.description:
Enter your Coinbase Advanced / CDP API key details. Use a read-only API key; trading permissions are not needed or used.

Open the [Coinbase API key page](https://portal.cdp.coinbase.com/access/api).
user.title: Coinbase Advanced API

data_description.api_key: Paste the full CDP key name, for example organizations/ORG_ID/apiKeys/KEY_ID. Do not use the display name.
data_description.api_token: Paste the EC private key from the downloaded Coinbase CDP key JSON. Literal \n line breaks are accepted.

reauth_confirm.description:
Enter replacement read-only Coinbase Advanced / CDP API key details.

Open the [Coinbase API key page](https://portal.cdp.coinbase.com/access/api).
reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Coinbase Advanced

error.currency_unavailable: One or more requested wallet assets are not available in your Coinbase accounts. Wallet balances use asset symbols such as ETH or BTC, not product pairs such as ETH-USD.
error.exchange_rate_unavailable: One or more requested exchange-rate currencies are not available.
error.product_unavailable: One or more requested products are not available. Product price sensors use market pairs such as ETH-USD or BTC-USD.

data.account_balance_currencies: Wallet balances: asset symbols, e.g. ETH, BTC, USDC. Leave empty for non-zero wallets only.
data.include_zero_balances: Include zero-balance wallet sensors when no explicit wallet filter is set.
data.products: Product price sensors: market pairs, e.g. ETH-USD, BTC-USD. A single asset like ETH is expanded using the selected base currency, e.g. ETH-USD.
data.exchange_rate_currencies: Exchange-rate sensors: target currencies, e.g. EUR, BTC, ETH.
data.exchange_base: Quote/base currency for prices and exchange rates, e.g. USD or EUR.
data.include_transaction_summary: Fetch transaction summary if your API key has permission.

init.description: Configure Coinbase Advanced depot sensors and read-only API access. Wallet balances are assets such as ETH. Product prices are market pairs such as ETH-USD.
init.title: Coinbase Advanced options
